bird.name: Papuan nightjar
bird.summary: The Papuan nightjar or Papuan eared-nightjar (Eurostopodus papuensis) is a species of nightjar in the family of Caprimulgidae. It is found…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

relations.subject: Papuan nightjar
relations.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and some surrounding islands

relations.subject: Papuan nightjar
relations.evidence: However it does seem scarce, and is presumably threatened by habitat loss and degredation
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
